name: devops-demo
description: Production-grade Node.js application with full DevOps pipeline — CI/CD, Kubernetes, Helm, ArgoCD, monitoring

scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health | node -e "process.stdin.resume(); process.stdin.on('data', d => { const j = JSON.parse(d); console.log(j.status === 'ok' ? '✅ Healthy' : '❌ Unhealthy'); })"
